runs.explanation: The average is divided by `window` instead of `len(tail)`. When the series is shorter than the window, `tail` has fewer elements than `window`, so dividing by `window` gives an incorrectly low result. The divisor should be `len(tail)`.
runs.raw:
The bug is on line 68: the average is computed as `total / window` instead of `total / len(tail)`. When the series has fewer elements than the window, this produces an incorrect (too-small) average. The divisor should be `len(tail)`.
